query:
-- Find all clients with phone numbers NOT in E.164 format (+1XXXXXXXXXX)
SELECT id, localId, businessOwnerId, name, phone
FROM clients
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL 
  AND phone != ''
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
ORDER BY businessOwnerId, name
LIMIT 50;
